artifacts.role: generic PHP-core IR printer now including the null literal needed by nullable PHP adapter arguments
typed shell metadata for the grouped WP_Http make_absolute_url adapter
grouped WP_Http helper compiler manifest proving nine adapter cases
WPHX-312.58 oracle/candidate manifest using the compiler-emitted original-path public shell
behavior receipt for the retired temporary shell candidate

claims: WPHX PHP emits the original-path WP_Http::make_absolute_url public adapter in the grouped class-wp-http.php shell.
The WPHX-312.58 candidate no longer copies and patches a PHP method body in its runner.
PHP still owns wp_parse_url, empty(), component presence checks, and parse-failure passthrough at the public boundary while Haxe owns URL assembly and normalization.
non_claims: This does not claim whole-file WP_Http ownership.
This does not claim WP_Http::request, redirect following, live HTTP transport, Requests network I/O, installed distribution behavior, or generated WP_Http_Cookie ownership.
This does not claim WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
